title: dactylorhiza cataonica subsp. caucasica
intro: Dactylorhiza cataonica subsp. caucasica, also known as the Caucasian Marsh Orchid, is a subspecies of orchid native to the Caucasus region. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dactylorhiza cataonica subsp. caucasica include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions, such as hypertension, digestive issues, and respiratory problems.
